mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM sys_author_application WHERE apply_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE review_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_comment WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_interaction WHERE action_type = 'like'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_collection WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_message WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_conversation WHERE conversation_type = 'group'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE 1 = 1
AND success_status = #{successStatus}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_post WHERE status != 4
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_reply WHERE status != 3
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE request_scene_type = 'rag'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_agent_task WHERE 1 = 1
AND status = #{status}
